titleStmt.title: SII 37.408: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 408. (A.R. No. B 55 of 1941-42.) Niṇḍali, Venkatagiri Taluk, Nellore District.

summary.p: Slab lying near a well in survey No. 63/12.
This is dated Śaka 1710, Kīlaka, Kārttīka śu. 15, Thursday, corresponding to 1788 A.D., November 13.

It records the construction of a well and a maṇḍapa at Niṇḍali by Śrirām Peda-Rāmanna son of Nārāyaṇa Seṭṭi of the Granthiśala-gōtra who are the clerks (gumāsta) of Chennappa-Śeṭṭi, born of the Sūgūri-vaṁśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1710 Agunēṭi kīlaka nāma saṁvatsara
kā¨rttika śu pau¨rnamī guruvāraṁ yaṁdu śrī manmahārāja
rājādhirāja rāja śrī velgōṭi baṁggāru kumāra yācamanā
yaniṁggāri yelubaḍi jāgīru veṁkkaṭa giri śīmalō niṁḍḍali Anē
grāmānaku prāgbhāgamaṁdu rājabhāṭalō Utpannamaina dharma
śāsana kramameṭlannanu śrīmatu sūgūri vaṁśa yaki pārā
vāra sudhākarulayni dānappa śeṭṭigāri putṛlayni canna
ppaśeṭṭigāriki gumastālu . graṁdhi śala gōtrōdbhavulayina nārā
yaṇaśeṭṭigāri putrulayni śrīrāṁ peda
rāmaṁnnagāru yīsthalamaṁddu dharmā¨rdhaṁgā
dabhāvi nimāṇaṁ cēyiṁcci śilā śāsanaṁ ggā
nuṁnnu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānuṁnnu maṁṭapa pra
tiṣṭa cēyiṁcci paramēśvarā¨rpaṇaṁggā vrāyiṁccina
dharma śāsanamu .
Digital edition of SII 37.408 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
